# Cross-algorithm Pareto comparison

*Generated by `cargo run --release --bin compare-algorithms`. 1000 trials per cell, base seed `0xdeadbeefcafef00d`.*

One section per headline metric. Each row is a share rate; each column is one algorithm. The **bold** entry per row is the winner in that metric's direction-of-improvement; entries within 5% (relative) of the winner are also bolded as effective ties. Algorithms are ordered: production reference → axis-swap variants → recommendation (`FullRemedy`).

## cold-start convergence rate (↑ higher is better)

| SPM | VardiffState | ClassicComposed | Parametric | ParametricStrict | ClassicPartialRetarget-30 | EWMA-60s | SlidingWindow-10t | FullRemedy |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 6 | 83.2% | 85.1% | **100.0%** | **100.0%** | **96.3%** | **100.0%** | **100.0%** | **100.0%** |

| 30 | **99.7%** | **99.3%** | **100.0%** | **100.0%** | **99.4%** | **100.0%** | **100.0%** | **100.0%** |
| 60 | **100.0%** | **100.0%** | **100.0%** | **100.0%** | **99.4%** | **100.0%** | **100.0%** | **100.0%** |
| 120 | **100.0%** | **100.0%** | **100.0%** | **100.0%** | **99.4%** | **100.0%** | **100.0%** | **100.0%** |
